description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a wood-textured exterior and a prominent control panel. The front face displays a vibrant game marquee labeled 'Crack Nuts' with colorful graphics and playful artwork, while the screen area is surrounded by a bezel and additional game-themed art. The control panel is equipped with multiple colored buttons and a joystick, arranged for single-player gameplay, and is clearly labeled for game functions. The cabinet's sides and back are plain, finished in a dark wood grain without any additional graphics or decals. The lower front section appears to house a coin slot and access panel, typical of arcade machines. The overall build is robust, with a hard, smooth surface and a slightly glossy finish.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with wood-textured sides, a colorful game marquee, and a control panel featuring multiple buttons and a joystick. The front is detailed and interactive, while the sides and back are plain wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee artwork, screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, and a coin slot area.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood-textured panel and the cabinet's profile shape.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the unadorned, flat wood-textured back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain wood-textured panel and the cabinet's profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a row, clearly labeled for game functions
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; colorful, cartoonish artwork with the game title 'Crack Nuts', featuring playful graphics and a lively theme
